title: Dimorphostemon glandulosus

Additionally, molecular phylogenetic studies have also supported the placement of Dimorphostemon glandulosus within the Apiaceae family. The genus Dimorphostemon is typically placed within the subfamily Apioideae, which is a large subfamily within the Apiaceae family. This classification is subject to ongoing research and revision, as our understanding of plant relationships and evolution continues to evolve.
